title: EB and CC have updates - Update button, Release notes and Poly Lens links are available
scenario: Firmware update flow for earbuds and charge case shows inconsistent update paths with Poly Lens Desktop requirement for charge case on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. Ensure both the earbuds and the charge case have firmware updates available.
3. Observe the Update button displayed on the device home screen.
5. Verify the app navigates to Device Settings with the Software Update tab expanded.
6. Observe the earbuds section — verify an Update button with a "1" tag is displayed on the settings tab.
7. Observe the charge case section — verify "Update Available" and info about needing Poly Lens Desktop are displayed.
8. Tap the Release Notes link (for earbuds).
9. Tap the Poly Lens App link (for charge case).
expected:
1. Home screen displays the Update button when both earbuds and charge case have firmware updates available.
2. Tapping Update navigates to Device Settings → Software Update tab expanded.
3. Earbuds show an Update button with a "1" tag.
4. Charge case displays "Update Available" and info about needing Poly Lens Desktop.
5. Tapping Release Notes link opens the firmware release notes page.
6. Tapping Poly Lens App link opens the Poly Lens App page.
